title: Three Lives
description: A paper plugin that makes a 3 life system.
body:
A minecraft plugin that does what it says. All players have 3 lives. They spawn in on a green life where they are peaceful and cannot harm any players unless stated otherwise. When they die they hit there yellow life. The same rules apply. But if they die 1 more time they become a red name player. They can freely attack any players. However if they attack a green or a yellow they can fight back for 1 minute. If a red die there gamemode is updated to spectator mode. 

## **SUPPORT ME: ko-fi.com/slrrxx**
